title: BOE/IBG instrument family conflation - mechanism-tier taxonomy (docs only)
intent: Document the BOE/IBG instrument-family conflation (Type supplanting Brand+Model) and the long-term target taxonomy: Type = the level at which fabrication fundamentally diverges, surfaced as sound-production mechanism (acoustic/electro-acoustic/electric/bass/ukulele/mandolin/regional-ethnic), a Brand tier between Type and Model, lineage demoted to Model metadata. Records the MVP-scope per-model geometry-resolution check (J-45 first), model tiers, Smart Guitar exclusion, and forthcoming instruments. No code or CI behavior change.

diff_articulation.what_changed: New architecture doc naming the BOE/IBG family conflation; defines Type operationally as the level at which fabrication diverges; proposes mechanism-tier Type taxonomy (adds electro-acoustic and regional/ethnic Types); Carlos Jumbo moved to Tier 2; Smart Guitar excluded (not in public version); forthcoming cello/violin/banjo/mandolin noted; lineage demoted to Model metadata.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Captures institutional knowledge about the silent Type-family fallback (false-green class) and fixes the deferred re-architecture target; the MVP per-model resolution check is the in-scope correctness item.

files.intent: New doc: name the conflation, define Type operationally (fabrication divergence) at the mechanism tier, model tiers, MVP-scope check, deferral verdict.
verification: Review the doc end to end
